name: NVIDIA CORP
summary: NVIDIA is a data center scale AI infrastructure company that pioneered accelerated computing. It designs GPUs, CPUs, networking solutions, and full software stacks including CUDA, NVIDIA AI Enterprise, DRIVE, Clara, and Omniverse. Its platforms serve Data Center, Gaming, Professional Visualization, and Automotive markets, powering AI training, inference, autonomous driving, scientific computing, and 3D graphics for cloud providers, enterprises, and researchers worldwide.

products.name: NVIDIA CUDA
products.description: Foundational parallel computing development platform running on all NVIDIA GPUs, enabling compute-intensive workloads.

products.name: NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture
products.description: Data center scale design connecting 36 Grace CPUs and 72 Blackwell GPUs for trillion-parameter AI inference and training.

products.name: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra
products.description: Advanced platform optimized for agentic, reasoning, and physical AI with increased token throughput.

products.name: NVIDIA Grace CPU
products.description: NVIDIA's first data center CPU, introduced in 2023, built for giant-scale AI and high-performance computing.

products.name: GeForce GPUs
products.description: GPUs for gaming and PC consumers offering immersive graphics and AI application support.

products.name: Quadro/NVIDIA RTX GPUs
products.description: Enterprise workstation GPUs for professional visualization, design, and AI development.

products.name: NVIDIA AI Enterprise
products.description: Software platform functioning as an operating system for enterprise AI applications.

products.name: NVIDIA DRIVE
products.description: Full software stack for autonomous driving applications and automotive platforms.

products.name: NVIDIA Clara
products.description: AI software platform targeting healthcare applications including drug discovery and medical imaging.

products.name: NVIDIA Omniverse
products.description: Platform for physical AI applications and 3D simulation and design workflows.

products.name: NVIDIA Nemotron
products.description: Open AI model platform for agentic AI applications, recently accelerated in release cadence.

products.name: NVIDIA Cosmos
products.description: Open AI model platform for physical AI applications, recently accelerated in release cadence.

products.name: Dynamo Inference Software
products.description: Inference software leveraged with Blackwell Ultra to reduce cost per token and increase throughput.

products.name: Data Processing Unit (DPU)
products.description: New processor class introduced following Mellanox acquisition for data center networking and processing.

partnerships.description: All major CSPs use NVIDIA data center-scale infrastructure and computing platforms to deliver AI services.
AI model makers use NVIDIA infrastructure and software hosted at CSPs to develop and run AI models.
